_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of analytical tools and techniques
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Skill AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-003 (AB, cosine: 0.528), AB-S-007 (AB, cosine: 0.486).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.530). Shared vocabulary: [analytical]. NICE-only terms [knowledge, techniques, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [communication, complex, designing, executing, execution, executive] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.894, R=0.846). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of analytical tools and techniques" and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.568 ≈ STS 0.530 (gap 0.038). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analytical] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [analytical]. NICE-only: [knowledge, techniques, tools]. WIDAI-only: [communication, complex, designing, executing, execution, executive].

signals.detail: STS 0.530 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
